{"files":["db/queries/oidc.sql","pkg/protocol/oidc/keygen.go","pkg/protocol/oidc/keys.go","pkg/protocol/oidc/keylifecycle.go","pkg/protocol/oidc/keylifecycle_test.go","pkg/protocol/saml/keys_saml.go","pkg/server/server.go"],"verifyCommand":"go test ./pkg/protocol/... -v","acceptanceCriteria":["publish set = pending+active+decommissioning","sign uses single active","Activate demotes prior first then promotes","Retire active→409 else decommissioning","Reconcile idempotent","concurrent activate cannot yield two actives","full suite + smoke green"]}
